qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_motivo_incorp as oi_motivo_incorp, t0.c_motivo_incorp as c_motivo_incorp, t0.d_motivo_incorp as d_motivo_incorp, SEC.policy, t0.c_motivo_incorp as CODE, t0.d_motivo_incorp as TEXT FROM PER41_MOT_INCORP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.MotivosIncorporacion.MOTIVO_INCORP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_motivo_incorp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_motivo_incorp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_motivo_incorp as oi_motivo_incorp, SEC.policy FROM PER41_MOT_INCORP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.MotivosIncorporacion.MOTIVO_INCORP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_motivo_incorp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_motivo_incorp asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de Motivo de Incorporación. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código
attribute.name: c_motivo_incorp

attribute.description: Descripción de Motivo de Incorporación. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_motivo_incorp

attribute.description: Observaciones de Motivo de Incorporación. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 1024 caracteres.
attribute.label: Observaciones
attribute.name: o_motivo_incorp

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.MotivosIncorporacion.MOTIVO_INCORP.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Personal.MotivosIncorporacion.MOTIVO_INCORP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PER41_MOT_INCORP.oi_motivo_incorp) as CNT from PER41_MOT_INCORP Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER41_MOT_INCORP.oi_motivo_incorp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER41_MOT_INCORP.d_motivo_incorp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER41_MOT_INCORP.c_motivo_incorp,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT PER41_MOT_INCORP.oi_motivo_incorp as ID FROM PER41_MOT_INCORP WHERE PER41_MOT_INCORP.oi_motivo_incorp in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT PER41_MOT_INCORP.oi_motivo_incorp as ID, PER41_MOT_INCORP.c_motivo_incorp, PER41_MOT_INCORP.d_motivo_incorp, PER41_MOT_INCORP.o_motivo_incorp FROM PER41_MOT_INCORP WHERE PER41_MOT_INCORP.oi_motivo_incorp in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
